example.target: Eles compraram uma moradia com quintal.
example.gloss: They bought a house with a backyard.

example.target: A dona Ana mora no rés-do-chão.
example.gloss: Mrs Ana lives on the ground floor.

example.target: Guardamos as caixas velhas no sótão.
example.gloss: We keep the old boxes in the attic.

example.target: A garagem fica na cave do prédio.
example.gloss: The garage is in the basement of the building.

example.target: No verão jantamos no terraço.
example.gloss: In the summer we have dinner on the terrace.

example.target: As crianças estão a brincar no quintal.
example.gloss: The children are playing in the backyard.

example.target: Deixo o carro na garagem à noite.
example.gloss: I leave the car in the garage at night.

example.target: O gato subiu ao telhado.
example.gloss: The cat climbed onto the roof.

example.target: Pintámos as paredes da sala de branco.
example.gloss: We painted the living-room walls white.

example.target: Cuidado, o chão da cozinha está molhado.
example.gloss: Careful, the kitchen floor is wet.

example.target: O teto do quarto tem uma mancha de humidade.
example.gloss: The bedroom ceiling has a damp stain.

example.target: O corredor liga a sala aos quartos.
example.gloss: The hallway connects the living room to the bedrooms.

example.target: Fecha o portão quando saíres.
example.gloss: Close the gate when you leave.

example.target: No inverno sai fumo da chaminé.
example.gloss: In winter, smoke comes out of the chimney.

example.target: Alguém tocou à campainha.
example.gloss: Someone rang the doorbell.

example.target: A chave ficou presa na fechadura.
example.gloss: The key got stuck in the lock.

example.target: Pus a carta na caixa do correio.
example.gloss: I put the letter in the letterbox.

example.target: Liga o carregador à tomada.
example.gloss: Plug the charger into the socket.

example.target: O interruptor da casa de banho está partido.
example.gloss: The bathroom light switch is broken.

example.target: Preciso de mudar a lâmpada do quarto.
example.gloss: I need to change the bedroom light bulb.

example.target: Ligámos o aquecimento porque estava frio.
example.gloss: We turned on the heating because it was cold.

example.target: No inverno uso um aquecedor pequeno no escritório.
example.gloss: In winter I use a small heater in the office.

example.target: O quarto do hotel tem ar condicionado.
example.gloss: The hotel room has air conditioning.

example.target: O esquentador desligou-se e a água está fria.
example.gloss: The water heater switched off and the water is cold.

example.target: Fecho as persianas antes de dormir.
example.gloss: I close the blinds before sleeping.

example.target: A renda do apartamento subiu em janeiro.
example.gloss: The rent for the flat went up in January.

example.target: O senhorio ainda não arranjou o esquentador.
example.gloss: The landlord still hasn't fixed the water heater.

example.target: O inquilino paga a renda no primeiro dia do mês.
example.gloss: The tenant pays the rent on the first day of the month.

example.target: A mudança para a casa nova foi cansativa.
example.gloss: The move to the new house was tiring.

words.note: also the monthly fee paid by owners

example.target: Pagamos o condomínio todos os meses.
example.gloss: We pay the building fees every month.

example.target: Comprámos móveis novos para a sala.
example.gloss: We bought new furniture for the living room.

example.target: A estante está cheia de livros.
example.gloss: The bookcase is full of books.

example.target: As colheres estão na gaveta da cozinha.
example.gloss: The spoons are in the kitchen drawer.

example.target: A cómoda do quarto tem cinco gavetas.
example.gloss: The bedroom chest of drawers has five drawers.

example.target: O gato gosta de dormir no tapete da sala.
example.gloss: The cat likes to sleep on the living-room rug.

example.target: Abro as cortinas quando acordo.
example.gloss: I open the curtains when I wake up.

words.note: in Portugal also the bed pillow

example.target: Durmo com duas almofadas.
example.gloss: I sleep with two pillows.

example.target: Mudo os lençóis todas as semanas.
example.gloss: I change the sheets every week.

example.target: No inverno ponho mais um cobertor na cama.
example.gloss: In winter I put an extra blanket on the bed.

example.target: Comprei um edredão novo para o inverno.
example.gloss: I bought a new duvet for the winter.

example.target: O colchão novo é muito confortável.
example.gloss: The new mattress is very comfortable.

example.target: Deixei uma toalha limpa na casa de banho.
example.gloss: I left a clean towel in the bathroom.

example.target: Tenho um candeeiro na mesa de cabeceira.
example.gloss: I have a lamp on the bedside table.

example.target: A máquina de lavar roupa está a trabalhar.
example.gloss: The washing machine is running.

example.target: Pusemos os pratos na máquina de lavar loiça.
example.gloss: We put the plates in the dishwasher.

example.target: O peixe está no congelador.
example.gloss: The fish is in the freezer.

example.target: O frango está no forno há uma hora.
example.gloss: The chicken has been in the oven for an hour.

example.target: Aquece a sopa no micro-ondas.
example.gloss: Heat the soup up in the microwave.

example.target: Faço torradas na torradeira ao pequeno-almoço.
example.gloss: I make toast in the toaster at breakfast.

example.target: O aspirador novo faz pouco barulho.
example.gloss: The new vacuum cleaner makes little noise.

example.target: Cuidado, o ferro de engomar está quente.
example.gloss: Careful, the iron is hot.

example.target: A torneira da cozinha está a pingar.
example.gloss: The kitchen tap is dripping.

example.target: Deixei os copos no lava-loiça.
example.gloss: I left the glasses in the kitchen sink.

example.target: Arruma o teu quarto antes de sair.
example.gloss: Tidy your room before going out.

example.target: Vou varrer o chão da cozinha.
example.gloss: I'm going to sweep the kitchen floor.

example.target: A vassoura está atrás da porta.
example.gloss: The broom is behind the door.

example.target: Lavei o chão com a esfregona.
example.gloss: I washed the floor with the mop.

example.target: Ela está a aspirar a sala.
example.gloss: She is vacuuming the living room.

example.target: Limpo o pó dos móveis uma vez por semana.
example.gloss: I dust the furniture once a week.

example.target: Hoje és tu que lavas a loiça.
example.gloss: Today it's you who washes the dishes.

example.target: Estendi a roupa na varanda.
example.gloss: I hung the laundry out on the balcony.

example.target: O estendal está cheio de roupa.
example.gloss: The drying rack is full of clothes.

example.target: Detesto engomar camisas.
example.gloss: I hate ironing shirts.

example.target: Põe a mesa, o jantar está quase pronto.
example.gloss: Set the table, dinner is almost ready.

example.target: Depois do almoço, os meninos levantam a mesa.
example.gloss: After lunch, the kids clear the table.

example.target: Faço a cama logo de manhã.
example.gloss: I make the bed first thing in the morning.

example.target: À noite vou deitar o lixo fora.
example.gloss: In the evening I take the rubbish out.
